entry.title: BPA HC108420A0003 (P00010) awarded to DELL FEDERAL SYSTEMS L.P., was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Decentralized fee is .10% and DITCO fee is .25%

ns1:contingencyHumanitarianPeacekeepingO.description: HUMANITARIAN OR PEACEKEEPING OPERATION AS DEFINED IN 10 U.S.C. 2302(8)

ns1:solicitationProcedures.description: SUBJECT TO MULTIPLE AWARD FAIR OPPORTUNITY
